message:
🌱 kagent: expose kagent functionality through the API for external consumption (#1072)

* 🌱 Add kagent: expose kagent functionality through the API for external mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct PR URL for kagent#171 expose functionality through API

PR #208 fixes issue #203 (logging), not #171. PR #223 (merged
2025-04-11) explicitly closes #171 (external API consumption).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kagent-171-expose-kagent-functionality-through-the-api-for-external-consumption",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kagent: expose kagent functionality through the API for external consumption",
+    "description": "expose kagent functionality through the API for external consumption. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kagent deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kagent version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kagent -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kagent\nhelm list -n kagent 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kagent installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kagent configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kagent configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kagent -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kagent\nkubectl get configmap -n kagent -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kagent\n```\nFeedback/request from the discord: https://discord.com/channels/1346225185166065826/1346225185841221644/1351530953939484705"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for expose kagent functionality through the API for external…",
+        "description": "This commit adds detailed logging to all REST API handlers in the controller:\n\n- Add structured logging with context information (operation type, user ID, resource IDs)\n- Implement different log levels (Info for important events, V(1) for detailed operations)\n- Enhance error logging with detailed context\n- Improve validation error messages in the team creation handler\n- Create consistent logging patterns across all handlers\n- Add logging to helper functions for complete traceability\n\nThe\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kagent -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kagent\nkubectl get events -n kagent --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"expose kagent functionality through the API for external…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This commit adds detailed logging to all REST API handlers in the controller:\n\n- Add structured logging with context information (operation type, user ID, resource IDs)\n- Implement different log levels (Info for important events, V(1) for detailed operations)\n- Enhance error logging with detailed context\n- Improve validation error messages in the team creation handler\n- Create consistent logging",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
